Course Code: BUSA7186 
Course Description  
This is an advance level course on recent developments in the application of quantitative and 
qualitative data analysis in management and business research which is intended for students enrolled 
in the MS program. The purpose of this course is to expose

qualitative data analytical methods for management, behavioral and business research. A major purpose 
of this course is to help students to develop a thorough and formal resear ch (dissertation) proposal and 
thesis with special focus on Methodology and findings parts. 
Course Objectives  
The obje

the local and global business

• Major and Minor Mistakes in Data Analysis 
• Fundamentals of Mediation and Moderation

Cointegration and Error Correction Models, Stationarity and Impulse Response, 
Use of Cross sectional and Panel Data, Dummy Variables; Foundations and 
Estimation, Simultaneous Equation Models, Identification, Estimation of 
Equation System, Comparison of Alternative Estimators.
